creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you for the build log, but it appears stderr output is not included. If the log was created by redirecting to a file, can you try using the following syntax:

make > python27-build.log 2>&1

Can you please include (as attachments):

* pkg version -v output
* uname -a output
* contents of /etc/libmap.conf (if not empty)
